title: Melted Hash Fish Cakes
description: A crispy fish cake dish made with melted hash browns and a Kenyan twist, perfect for a light meal.
instructions: 2. Flake the cod fillets into a large bowl.
3. Add the melted hash browns, onion, garlic, coconut flour, eggs, salt, black pepper, and lemon juice to the bowl. Mix well.
4. Divide the mixture into 4-6 portions, depending on desired size.
5. Shape each portion into a patty.
6. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the patties are golden brown and cooked through.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
